New York City faces significant disruptions due to a blizzard, with over two feet of snow reported, emergency snow equipment deployed, and power outages affecting NJ and NYC, while local authorities manage public safety and transportation challenges.

### Risks & Alerts

- NYC deploys emergency snow equipment after Staten Island bears brunt of winter storm. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- NYC could see up to 2 feet of snow through Monday, warns NWS. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxPUlVScjU1ZDlsdkViV2VHeG5jcUlBbmEwOUNRejFYSXoyRE9haUNVUnZTaWdHZXZGOFJjamdnSjBocTJVNG5Lb3lLZzVkcXBwajUzWlNuYTB6UHFyRVRUejFGR2Y4bnljQzJLQlB1amh0MjlaSVAxTWxfbWEzZUpsbDNRcVUtb3lXYmgtdjVTaVdZLWhqU1RabkhVZDY?oc=5)
- Some NJ Transit lines to resume after blizzard dumps more than 2 feet of snow. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- LIVE UPDATES: NYC 311 reminds New Yorkers of Code Blue due to extreme cold. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxOU3VpS1ZFMmN1TnBHV2h5aTNsUHIyZVl4bHdlXzh4UkZ6U1NqTlhyRUpaT2FBVDQ0aUw5R2tabklORHBoLVp1cEZjQ3dpVTBZVU9yOVBxQmEzaF9KMnlocFp3ckZSZnQzdEctS2hubU9TV3pTZks1S3NXNXViX0k1eEptVnQ3b242TXRfSW1LU2t1VUZiYVdsTnRyZHJOUG1h?oc=5)
- NYC blizzard: Snowplow plunges into sidewalk sinkhole outside of City Hall. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMicEFVX3lxTE1NcXA0dXp1WVE2WXA3cnVlbnhPbjRrdHRXV2NKdERJVkxva2ZaUTUyNURfTndidDZpQXEyb3JEYmRFcHlzUEpBWjY1Mzd6WkMtbmpuRU1XaHk3ckdGOFhUX0JyZ3ZWSW52LTdGOGVBeDY?oc=5)
- Five injured in three-alarm fire on Church Ave in Brooklyn. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihwFBVV95cUxOckJSd1YxSDhYUzh0TDhWMmp6NkxsZl83TnF1YW1kWUZHeGhCSWMxWWp2eEpSRHBPTEluM1JaN29kZ3QxT3otMDRDeklhSHE1NnpxdUNxMTduSFY3aUV0T2haZUx1WHp0R3poeldPdFhOLVV5TzI0UjlKTXZSaC1faGZXQXhURWs?oc=5)
- NYPD officers injured after being hit with snowballs at Washington Square Park. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Mamdani reports no street deaths so far, dozens brought inside during NYC blizzard. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxOT0NRVTFfRVRzdGdmaWYtZUlVX3R2Y3dzelBncFBSOE9MN0prTlh1Mmo3LXUyWGZYTnR6WTVpNF9WM0IxOVYyNXpUdlJYUnpKUXN3SHJ3TkdFSzQ1M1RaRG5HcThvWTYyanNRbktkVEZNd1hCeGVuMkNha2dLSlJScWJlZ2ZOc0lNUmJCVDZ2Q0JlSUZRTjFPd2hicDVzaHBKcHhV?oc=5)

### Opportunities & Welfare

- State to fund study of west-of-Hudson commuter rail and bus links to improve transportation options.
